seo.title: Mississippi Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant requirements in Mississippi — fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license mississippi, dental assistant certification mississippi, RDA mississippi, DANB CDA mississippi, dental assistant radiography mississippi

board.name: Mississippi State Board of Dental Examiners
board.mailing_address:
Mississippi State Board of Dental Examiners
600 East Amite Street, Suite 100
Jackson, MS 39201

license_types.title: Dental Assistant (no state license required)
license_types.description: No state-level credential required for general dental assistants in Mississippi.

steps.title: Review Licensing Requirements
steps.description: Visit the Mississippi State Board of Dental Examiners (MSBDE) 'Dental Assistant Information' page to understand the specific requirements for Basic Dental Assistants, Expanded Duty Dental Assistants, or Dental Radiographers. Ensure you meet all educational and certification criteria, such as a high school diploma/GED, current CPR, and a Board-approved infection control course completed prior to application.

steps.title: Gather Supporting Documents
steps.description: Collect all necessary documents, including proof of high school diploma/GED, current CPR certification from the American Heart Association (AHA) or American Red Cross (ARC), and the certificate of completion for a Board-approved infection control course. These will need to be uploaded during your online application.

steps.title: Create an Account on the Portal
steps.description: Navigate to the MSBDE Online Licensing Application Portal by clicking 'Apply Online' from the MSBDE website. As a new applicant, you must create an account with a unique username and password before proceeding with your application.

steps.title: Complete the Online Application
steps.description: Log into your new account on the MSBDE Online Licensing Application Portal. Fill out all sections of the application accurately and completely, uploading all required supporting documents as instructed within the portal.

steps.title: Pay the Application Fee
steps.description: Submit the non-refundable initial application fee of $50 through the MSBDE Online Licensing Application Portal using a credit or debit card.

steps.title: Submit Your Application
steps.description: After all sections are completed, documents uploaded, and the fee paid, formally submit your application through the MSBDE Online Licensing Application Portal. You can track your application status by logging back into your account.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Mississippi does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. DANB national certification is recognized and recommended.

faqs.question: Does Mississippi require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: No, Mississippi does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. However, expanded functions and radiography may require permits or certifications.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Mississippi.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: There is no state application fee for general dental assistants in Mississippi. However, DANB CDA exam costs $450, and radiography certifications may have additional fees.

reciprocity.notes: Mississippi does not license general dental assistants. DANB CDA or board-approved radiology course required for x-rays.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Mississippi
hero.dek: To apply for a Dental Assistant license in Mississippi, all applicants must use the MSBDE Online Licensing Application Portal found on the Mississippi State Board of Dental Examiners website.

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the 'Apply Online' page, then click 'Click here to begin your application' to access the portal. New applicants must create a unique account with a username and password before starting an application.
